verse1.lyrics: It's been a hard day's night and I've been working like a dog
It's been a hard day's night, I should be sleeping like a log
But when I get home to you, I find the things that you do, will make me feel all right

verse2.lyrics: You know I work all day to get you money to buy you things and
it's worth it just to hear you say, you're gonna give me everything
So why on earth should I moan, cause when I get you alone, you know I'll feel O.K.

chorus.lyrics: When I'm home everything seems to be right
When I'm home feeling you holding me tight, tight, yeah!

bridge.lyrics: So why on earth should I moan, cause when I get you alone, you know I'll feel O.K.

ending.lyrics: You know I feel all right
You know I feel all right
